sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain with flexion and extension of the elbow, describing it as throbbing. He reports pain on the dorsal aspect of the forearm, particularly when flexing his hand. The patient reports pain in the right elbow and also reports pain in the left hand. He describes tenderness in the elbow. The patient reports redness and swelling.
medical_concepts: pain with flexion of the elbow
pain with extension of the elbow
pain on the dorsal aspect of the forearm

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals mild tenderness to palpation over the lateral epicondyle. Range of motion is limited due to pain. No signs of inflammation are noted.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are consistent with lateral epicondylitis.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a sling. Order motrin. Follow up in two weeks to assess response to treatment.

medical_concepts: pain with flexion of the elbow
pain with extension of the elbow
pain on the dorsal aspect of the forearm
